title: Better 3D Lanterns
description: Remodels the lanterns to be a little fancier, whilst maintaining the classic vanilla style.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3007af40c0f14ab812737e68a1692b7c2a2f829a_0.webp)
Remodels the lanterns to be a little fancier, whilst maintaining the classic vanilla style.

📌It is recommended to disable lantern animations when using certain shaders.

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/474c2c5ce7e8b862abfa7581596b74d69e4871e4.png)

📕**Description**

A small pack that changes the lantern, soul lantern and copper lantern model to be a little fancier without breaking the Vanilla style.

It pack adds unique designs for each lantern variant, these will also be seen in 3D in the player's hand and in the inventory.  

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/474c2c5ce7e8b862abfa7581596b74d69e4871e4.png)

![InGame1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxx4Jq/images/0eff8bf68e5cfcd789f62d969cd1ce5c1bc244bf.png)
![InGame2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxx4Jq/images/10c77ce626693df3f54d5f2acfc9de82c927d03c.png)
![InGame3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxx4Jq/images/3d681acfd63db5d7400a7bf9333d9db4624a3c78.png)
![InGame4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E8mxx4Jq/images/3ffaea2f3ea5c5c5965d032a1e05de30c910f26c.png)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/474c2c5ce7e8b862abfa7581596b74d69e4871e4.png)

📝 Notes

You can't claim this pack as yours, steal the code for any resource pack. You can showcase this pack in any video as long as I am credited properly.

If you need help, or just want to keep up with me, here's my [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/2upRDWM5qB).

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/474c2c5ce7e8b862abfa7581596b74d69e4871e4.png)
